reason: Geopolitical instability, specifically the fresh Iran escalation, has triggered an immediate and sharp correction in Bitcoin, 'short-circuiting' recent bullish momentum. While long-term infrastructure and specific altcoin narratives (HYPE, Ethereum Foundation, MoonPay) show promise, the immediate market is dominated by risk-off sentiment and increased volatility. The swift 3.5% drop indicates fragility, making caution prudent. Immediate focus should be on geopolitical de-escalation or stabilization to prevent further downside, as prior support levels are being tested.
headlines: Arthur Hayes: Strong Revenue and Real Trading Could Send HYPE to $150
Bitcoin quickly drops 3.5% as fresh Iran escalation short-circuits crypto rally
One mysterious investor made $2.5 million profit in hours by betting big on the latest Trump gala news
MoonPay introduces Ledger-secured AI crypto agents to address wallet key risks
Ethereum Foundation publishes new mandate defining its role, core principles
